leighton_oracle.reason: Leighton bisection/diameter bounds apply to the fabric topology, not a single synthesized router block; oracle is checked on the NoC-sim side (exports/.../records/*tornado*.json)

verdict.rationale: Single router-block post-P&R result; F1/F2 is the fabric-level question. This record supplies the physical EDA-cost RHS of comb T1A's inequality; the d4-vs-d6 pair-verdict carries the cross-check.
